sentences.target: Die Technik im Büro spinnt heute.

translations.de: Die Technik im Büro spinnt heute.
translations.en: The office tech is acting up today.
translations.es: Hoy la tecnología en la oficina está fallando.
translations.fr: Le matériel du bureau déconne aujourd'hui.
translations.it: La tecnologia in ufficio oggi fa i capricci.
translations.zh-Hans: 办公室的设备今天出毛病了。
translations.yue: 今日辦公室啲設備出咗問題。
translations.pt: Os equipamentos do escritório estão dando problema hoje.
translations.vi: Hôm nay thiết bị trong văn phòng bị trục trặc.
translations.nl: De techniek op kantoor werkt vandaag niet mee.
translations.hi: आज दफ्तर के उपकरण गड़बड़ा रहे हैं.
translations.el: Ο εξοπλισμός στο γραφείο σήμερα κάνει νερά.
translations.nb: Teknikken på kontoret krangler i dag.
translations.id: Teknologi di kantor lagi bermasalah hari ini.
translations.sv: Tekniken på kontoret krånglar i dag.
translations.ro: Echipamentele de la birou fac figuri azi.
translations.da: Teknikken på kontoret driller i dag.
translations.ja: 今日はオフィスの機器の調子が悪いです。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative singular feminine, agreeing with 'Technik' as subject.
Common noun; head of the subject NP ('Die Technik'), feminine singular.
Contraction of 'in dem' (preposition + definite article); introduces a prepositional phrase.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'im' (locative PP).
Finite verb; 3rd person singular present indicative; colloquial meaning 'to act up/malfunction'.
Temporal adverb; modifies the clause to indicate time.

sentences.target: Mit der Technik komme ich nicht klar.
sentences.reading: /mɪt deːɐ ˈtɛçnɪk ˈkɔmə ɪç nɪçt klaːʁ/

translations.de: Mit der Technik komme ich nicht klar.
translations.ipa: /mɪt deːɐ ˈtɛçnɪk ˈkɔmə ɪç nɪçt klaːʁ/
translations.en: I can’t deal with the tech.
translations.es: No me llevo bien con la tecnología.
translations.fr: Je ne m'en sors pas avec la technologie.
translations.it: Con la tecnologia non ci so fare.
translations.ru: Я не умею обращаться с техникой.
translations.pt: Eu não sei lidar com tecnologia.
translations.vi: Tôi không rành về công nghệ.
translations.ar: أنا لا أجيد التعامل עם التكنولوجيا.
translations.nl: Ik kan niet overweg met techniek.
translations.hi: मुझे तकनीक की समझ नहीं है.
translations.el: Δεν τα πάω καλά με την τεχνολογία.
translations.nb: Jeg er ikke flink med teknologi.
translations.da: Jeg kan ikke finde ud af teknik.

tokens.explanation: Preposition governing dative; fronts a PP for emphasis/topic.
Definite article; dative singular feminine, agreeing with 'Technik' after 'mit'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'mit' (dative).
Finite verb; 1st person singular present indicative; part of the separable verb 'klarkommen' ('to cope/manage').
Personal pronoun; 1st person singular nominative; subject placed post-verbally due to fronted PP.
Negation particle; negates the verb phrase.
Separable verb particle (from adjective 'klar'); completes the verb 'klarkommen' ('to cope/manage').

sentences.target: Sie erklärt mir die Technik ganz einfach.
sentences.reading: /ziː ɛʁˈklɛːʁt miːɐ diː ˈtɛçnɪk gants ˈaɪnfaχ/

translations.de: Sie erklärt mir die Technik ganz einfach.
translations.ipa: /ziː ɛʁˈklɛːʁt miːɐ diː ˈtɛçnɪk gants ˈaɪnfaχ/
translations.en: She explains the technique to me really simply.
translations.es: Ella me explica la técnica de forma muy sencilla.
translations.fr: Elle m'explique la technique très simplement.
translations.it: Lei mi spiega la tecnica in modo molto semplice.
translations.ko: 그녀가 그 방법을 아주 쉽게 설명해줘요.
translations.zh-Hans: 她把这个技巧讲得很简单。
translations.yue: 佢用好簡單嘅方式同我解釋個技巧。
translations.ru: Она очень просто объясняет мне эту технику.
translations.pt: Ela me explica a técnica de forma bem simples.
translations.he: היא מסבירה לי את הטכניקה בצורה ממש פשוטה.
translations.tr: Tekniği bana çok basit şekilde anlatıyor.
translations.vi: Cô ấy giải thích kỹ thuật cho tôi rất đơn giản.
translations.ar: هي تشرح لي الطريقة بشكل بسيط جداً.
translations.nl: Ze legt me de techniek heel eenvoudig uit.
translations.uk: Вона дуже просто пояснює мені цю техніку.
translations.hu: Nagyon egyszerűen elmagyarázza nekem a technikát.
translations.hi: वह मुझे यह तरीका बहुत आसानी से समझाती है.
translations.pl: Ona tłumaczy mi tę technikę bardzo prosto.
translations.el: Μου εξηγεί την τεχνική πολύ απλά.
translations.nb: Hun forklarer meg teknikken på en veldig enkel måte.
translations.id: Dia menjelaskan tekniknya kepada saya dengan sangat sederhana.
translations.sv: Hon förklarar tekniken för mig på ett väldigt enkelt sätt.
translations.ro: Îmi explică tehnica într-un mod foarte simplu.
translations.cs: Vysvětluje mi tu techniku velmi jednoduše.
translations.da: Hun forklarer mig teknikken på en meget enkel måde.
translations.fi: Hän selittää minulle tekniikan todella yksinkertaisesti.
translations.ja: 彼女はそのやり方をとてもわかりやすく説明してくれます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 3rd person singular nominative; subject.
Finite verb; 3rd person singular present indicative; main predicate.
Personal pronoun; 1st person singular dative; indirect object/recipient.
Definite article; accusative singular feminine, agreeing with 'Technik' as direct object.
Common noun; direct object of 'erklärt'.
Degree adverb; intensifies 'einfach'.
Manner adverb; modifies 'erklärt' ('explains simply').

sentences.target: Meine Oma schimpft über die Technik.

translations.de: Meine Oma schimpft über die Technik.
translations.en: My grandma complains about the tech.
translations.es: Mi abuela se queja de la tecnología.
translations.fr: Ma grand-mère râle contre la technologie.
translations.it: Mia nonna si lamenta della tecnologia.
translations.zh-Hans: 我奶奶抱怨这些电子产品。
translations.yue: 我阿嫲成日鬧啲電子產品。
translations.vi: Bà tôi phàn nàn về công nghệ.
translations.nl: Mijn oma klaagt over de technologie.
translations.hi: मेरी दादी तकनीक के बारे में शिकायत करती हैं.
translations.el: Η γιαγιά μου παραπονιέται για την τεχνολογία.
translations.ro: Bunica mea se plânge de tehnologie.
translations.cs: Moje babička si stěžuje na techniku.
translations.ja: 祖母は機械に文句を言っています。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner; nominative singular feminine, modifying 'Oma'.
Common noun; head of subject NP.
Finite verb; 3rd person singular present indicative; main predicate.
Preposition; here with accusative meaning 'about' (topic of complaint).
Definite article; accusative singular feminine, agreeing with 'Technik' after 'über'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'über'.
